top_signals.title: Ukraine is launching strike-drones from everything – including Black Sea robo-boats
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon is studying the lesson as it shifts focus toward a possible conflict with China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Robinhood Rolls Out Perpetual Futures Tied to Commodities, ETFs
top_signals.summary: Robinhood Markets Inc. is rolling out perpetual futures tied to commodities, exchange-traded funds and currencies in Europe, seeking to capitalize on the rise in round-the-clock trading that’s long been a feature of crypto markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Dealmakers 'Unlock the Magic' with Care Bears Sale
top_signals.summary: Jeff Collins, Managing Partner at Cloverlay, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." IVEST Consumer Partners and Cloverlay announced the sale of Care Bears to Authentic Brands Group. They discuss the deal and the value of intellectual property. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Automakers report mixed U.S. sales results as hybrid vehicles drive growth
top_signals.summary: Second-quarter U.S. new vehicle sales show a sharp divide, with automakers offering hybrid models largely outperforming those without  them.

top_signals.title: America Needs More Weapons. JPMorgan Wants to Add Its Firepower. - WSJ
top_signals.summary: America Needs More Weapons. JPMorgan Wants to Add Its Firepower.  WSJ
